summary: Taj, Taryll, and TJ Jackson are the sons of Tito Jackson and nephews of Michael Jackson. They formed the R&B vocal group 3T in the late 1980s and released albums in the 1990s. Their connection to the Jackson family music legacy is central to their career narrative.

J.J. Abrams is an American filmmaker and producer known for Lost (2004), Star Trek (2009), and Star Wars: The Force Awakens (2015). His daughter Gracie Abrams is a singer-songwriter who opened for Taylor Swift on the Eras Tour and received a Grammy nomination in 2024. She is cited as one of the most prominent nepo babies in music.

Ben Affleck is an American actor, director, and screenwriter who won the Academy Award for Best Original Screenplay for Good Will Hunting (1997) and Best Picture for Argo (2012). Jennifer Garner is an American actress known for Alias (2001) and numerous film roles. Their daughter Violet Affleck has appeared in documentary film productions.
Alan Alda is an American actor, director, and writer known for M*A*S*H (1972–1983). Two of his daughters, Elizabeth and Beatrice Alda, have pursued acting careers in film and television.

Keith Allen is a Welsh actor known for numerous British film and television productions. Alison Owen is an Emmy Award-winning British film producer whose credits include Elizabeth (1998) and Sylvia (2003). Their daughter Lily Allen is a British singer who has publicly identified as a nepo baby, acknowledging her 'privileged upbringing that has created so many opportunities.'

John Aniston was a Greek-American actor known for his decades-long role as Victor Kiriakis on Days of Our Lives. Nancy Dow was an American actress who appeared in several television productions. Their daughter Jennifer Aniston became one of the most prominent television and film actresses of her generation, known for Friends (1994–2004).

Judd Apatow is an American film director and producer known for The 40-Year-Old Virgin (2005) and Knocked Up (2007). His wife Leslie Mann is an actress known for numerous Apatow productions. Their daughters Maude and Iris Apatow both appeared in Apatow's films as children and have pursued their own acting careers. Maude Apatow's casting in Euphoria (2022) was cited as a catalyst for the nepo baby conversation on social media.

Lucille Ball was an American actress, comedian, and television producer widely regarded as one of the greatest entertainers in American television history, known for I Love Lucy (1951). Desi Arnaz was a Cuban-American musician and actor, and co-founder of Desilu Productions. Their son Desi Arnaz Jr. and daughter Lucie Arnaz both pursued entertainment careers.

Lewis Arquette was an American character actor with a career spanning several decades. Five of his children — Rosanna, Richmond, Patricia, Alexis, and David — all pursued acting careers. Patricia Arquette won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Boyhood (2014).

Kevin Bacon is an American actor known for Footloose (1984), A Few Good Men (1992), and numerous other productions. Kyra Sedgwick is an American actress known for The Closer (2005). Their daughter Sosie Bacon is an actress known for Scream (2022) and 13 Reasons Why. Their son Travis Bacon is a musician.

Alec, Daniel, Billy, and Stephen Baldwin are four brothers who all pursued acting careers. Alec Baldwin is the most prominent, known for his stage, film, and television work. Their parents were not in the entertainment industry.

The Barrymore family has been active in American theater and film for over a century. Lionel and John Barrymore were prominent film actors of the silent and early sound era. John's son John Drew Barrymore and granddaughter Drew Barrymore continued the family's presence in Hollywood film.

Kent Bateman is an American director and writer who worked extensively in television. His daughter Justine Bateman achieved fame as Mallory Keaton in Family Ties (1982-1989), one of the most popular sitcoms of the 1980s. His son Jason Bateman is known for Arrested Development (2003-2019) and Ozark (2017-2022), for which he won the Emmy Award for Outstanding Directing. The Batemans are one of the few families where both siblings became major stars.

David Beckham is a British former professional soccer player and television personality. Victoria Beckham is a British singer known as Posh Spice from the Spice Girls (1996) and a fashion designer. Their son Brooklyn Beckham has pursued modeling and photography careers.

John Belushi was an American comedian and actor, an original Saturday Night Live cast member known for Animal House (1978) and The Blues Brothers (1980). His brother Jim Belushi is an actor known for According to Jim (2001) and numerous film roles. Jim Belushi's son Robert Belushi is also an actor. Three generations of the family in entertainment.

Humphrey Bogart was one of the greatest film actors in Hollywood history, known for Casablanca (1942), The Maltese Falcon (1941), and The African Queen (1951), for which he won the Academy Award for Best Actor. Lauren Bacall was an actress known for her partnership with Bogart and her distinctive voice and style. Their son Stephen Bogart became a documentary filmmaker. Lauren Bacall's son Sam Robards, with actor Jason Robards, is an actor with a career in film and television.

members.role: Second generation — actor (via Bacall + Jason Robards)

summary: David Bowie was an English singer-songwriter widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. His first wife Angie Bowie was an American model and actress. Their son Duncan Jones is a film director who won the BAFTA Award for Outstanding Debut for Moon (2009). David Bowie wrote the song Kooks (1971) for his son at the time of his birth.

Marlon Brando is widely regarded as one of the most influential actors in cinema history, known for A Streetcar Named Desire (1951) and The Godfather (1972). His son Christian Brando and son Miko Brando both pursued acting and entertainment careers.

Lloyd Bridges was an American actor with a career spanning six decades in film and television. Both of his sons, Beau and Jeff Bridges, became prominent film actors. Jeff Bridges won the Academy Award for Best Actor for Crazy Heart (2009).

James Brolin is an American actor known for Westworld (1973) and Marcus Welby, M.D. (1969). He is married to Barbra Streisand. His son Josh Brolin is an actor known for No Country for Old Men (2007), Milk (2008), and the Avengers franchise. Josh Brolin made his film debut in The Goonies (1985).
Pierce Brosnan is an Irish actor known for his portrayal of James Bond in four films (1995–2002). His sons Dylan and Paris Brosnan have both pursued modeling and acting careers.
James Caan was an American actor known for The Godfather (1972) and Misery (1990). His son Scott Caan is known for Hawaii Five-0 (2010-2020) and the Ocean's Eleven franchise.

Michael Caine is a British actor who has won two Academy Awards for Best Supporting Actor for Hannah and Her Sisters (1986) and The Cider House Rules (1999). His daughter Natasha Caine has pursued an acting career.

John Carradine was an American character actor with one of the longest careers in Hollywood history. Three of his sons — David, Keith, and Robert — all became actors. David Carradine is best known for the Kung Fu television series (1972–1975).

Jay-Z (Shawn Carter) is an American rapper, music executive, and entrepreneur, one of the best-selling music artists of all time. Beyoncé Knowles-Carter is one of the most commercially successful musicians of the 21st century. Their daughter Blue Ivy Carter won the Grammy Award for Best Music Video for Brown Skin Girl (2021) at age nine, becoming one of the youngest Grammy winners in history.

John Cassavetes was an American actor and filmmaker regarded as a pioneer of American independent cinema. Gena Rowlands is an American actress who has won two Emmy Awards and received two Academy Award nominations. Their son Nick Cassavetes is a film director known for The Notebook (2004). Their daughter Zoe Cassavetes is also a filmmaker.

Vincent Cassel is a French actor known for Black Swan (2010), Eastern Promises (2007), and numerous French and international productions. Monica Bellucci is an Italian actress and model known for Malèna (2000) and the Matrix franchise. Their daughter Deva Cassel has pursued a modeling career and has become a prominent fashion figure in Europe.

Jack Cassidy was an American actor and singer known for his Broadway and television work. Shirley Jones is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Elmer Gantry (1960) and played the mother on The Partridge Family (1970). David Cassidy, Jack's son with actress Evelyn Ward, starred as Keith Partridge in The Partridge Family and became a major teen idol. David's daughter Katie Cassidy is an actress known for Arrow (2012). Three generations of entertainers.

Charlie Chaplin was a British actor, filmmaker, and composer, one of the most influential figures in the history of cinema. His daughter Geraldine Chaplin became a prominent actress. Geraldine's daughter Oona Chaplin is also an actress, known for Game of Thrones (2011). Three generations of the Chaplin family have worked in film.

Cher is an American singer and actress who has sold over 100 million records worldwide and won an Academy Award for Moonstruck (1987). Sonny Bono was an American singer, actor, and later politician. Their son Chaz Bono has worked as an actor, author, and musician.

Rosemary Clooney was an American singer and actress known for her recordings in the 1950s and her role in White Christmas (1954). Her brother Nick Clooney was a television journalist and host. Nick's son George Clooney became one of Hollywood's most prominent actors and directors, winning two Academy Awards.

Kurt Cobain was an American musician and co-founder of Nirvana. Courtney Love is an American musician and actress known for her band Hole and roles in films including The People vs. Larry Flynt (1996). Their daughter Frances Bean Cobain has worked as an artist, model, and producer.
Phil Collins is a British musician, singer-songwriter, and drummer, known as a solo artist and as a member of Genesis. His daughter Lily Collins pursued an acting career beginning in the late 2000s.

Sean Connery was a Scottish actor known for his portrayal of James Bond in seven films and for The Untouchables (1987), for which he won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor. His wife Diane Cilento was an Australian actress with an established film career. Their son Jason Connery is an actor and director.

Kelly Ripa is an American television personality and actress known for All My Children (1990-2002) and Live with Kelly (2001-present). Mark Consuelos is an American actor known for All My Children and Riverdale. Their son Michael Consuelos played the young version of his father's character Hiram Lodge in Riverdale (2018), one of the most directly documented nepo moments in recent television. Their daughter Lola Consuelos is a musician who has released original music.
Tim Conway was an American comedian and actor known for The Carol Burnett Show (1967–1978), for which he won four Emmy Awards. His daughter Kelly Conway has pursued a career in entertainment.

The Coppola family has been active in Hollywood film and music across multiple generations. Carmine Coppola was a composer and conductor. His son Francis Ford Coppola became one of the most prominent directors in American film history. Francis's daughter Sofia Coppola is a director and screenwriter. Francis's nephew Nicolas Cage (born Nicolas Coppola) is an actor who changed his surname early in his career.

Corin Redgrave was a British actor and the son of Michael Redgrave, brother of Vanessa and Lynn Redgrave. His daughter Jemma Redgrave is also an actress, extending the Redgrave family to a fourth generation of entertainers.

Kevin Costner is an American actor, director, and producer known for Field of Dreams (1989), Dances with Wolves (1990) — for which he won the Academy Award for Best Director — and The Bodyguard (1992). His daughter Lily Costner appeared alongside him in The Postman (1997).

Bryan Cranston is an American actor known for Breaking Bad (2008-2013), for which he won four Emmy Awards, and Malcolm in the Middle (2000-2006). His wife Robin Dearden is also an actress. Their daughter Taylor Dearden is an actress known for her role as Dr. Melissa King in The Pitt (2025), the Emmy Award-winning HBO medical drama. She uses her mother's surname, making her a covert nepo baby — fans were shocked when they discovered her connection to Bryan Cranston.

members.role: Second generation — actress (covert: uses Dearden surname)

summary: Kit Culkin is an American actor and the father and former manager of his children's acting careers. Macaulay Culkin achieved major commercial success with Home Alone (1990). His brothers Kieran and Rory Culkin also pursued acting careers.

Wanda Ventham is a British actress known for numerous British television productions including Doctor Who and UFO. Timothy Carlton is a British actor. Their son Benedict Cumberbatch is an actor known for Sherlock (2010), Doctor Strange (2016), and The Imitation Game (2014), for which he received an Academy Award nomination.

Tony Curtis was an American actor known for Some Like It Hot (1959) and Spartacus (1960). Janet Leigh was an American actress known for Psycho (1960) and Touch of Evil (1958). Their daughter Jamie Lee Curtis became a prominent film actress and has publicly acknowledged her status as a nepo baby. She won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022). Their daughter Kelly Curtis also pursued an acting career.

Dick Cusack was an American actor who appeared in several of his children's films. Four of his children — Ann, Joan, John, and Bill Cusack — all pursued acting careers. Joan Cusack received two Academy Award nominations. John Cusack became a leading film actor of the 1980s and 1990s.

Billy Ray Cyrus established a country music career in the early 1990s. His daughter Miley Cyrus began her career on Disney Channel's Hannah Montana (2006), in which Billy Ray Cyrus also had a recurring role.

Tim Daly is an American actor known for his role as Joe Hackett in Wings (1990-1997) and numerous film and television appearances. He is the brother of actress Tyne Daly. His son Sam Daly is an actor known for The Following and other television productions.

Jill Balcon was a British actress with a career in film, television, and stage. Her son Daniel Day-Lewis became one of the most acclaimed film actors of his generation, winning three Academy Awards for Best Actor — the most in history.

Danny DeVito is an American actor, director, and producer known for Taxi (1978), Twins (1988), and numerous other productions. Rhea Perlman is an American actress known for Cheers (1982–1993). Three of their children — Lucy, Grace, and Jake DeVito — have pursued careers in film and television.

Johnny Depp is an American actor known for Edward Scissorhands (1990), Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas (1998), and the Pirates of the Caribbean franchise. Vanessa Paradis is a French singer and actress. Their daughter Lily-Rose Depp has pursued careers in acting and modeling, known for The Idol (2023). Their son Jack Depp has also appeared in film productions.

Bruce Dern is an American actor who received Academy Award nominations for Coming Home (1978) and Nebraska (2013). Diane Ladd is an American actress who received three Academy Award nominations. They were briefly married, and their daughter Laura Dern became an acclaimed actress, winning the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Marriage Story (2019).

Caleb Deschanel is an American cinematographer with six Academy Award nominations for films including The Right Stuff (1983) and The Passion of the Christ (2004). Mary Jo Deschanel is an American actress known for Twin Peaks (1990). Their daughter Zooey Deschanel is an actress and musician known for New Girl (2011) and (500) Days of Summer (2009). Their daughter Emily Deschanel is an actress known for Bones (2005).

Howard Deutch is an American film director known for Pretty in Pink (1986) and Some Kind of Wonderful (1987). Lea Thompson is an American actress known for Back to the Future (1985) and Caroline in the City (1995). Their daughter Zoey Deutch is an actress known for Everybody Wants Some!! (2016) and Not Okay (2022).

Kirk Douglas became one of Hollywood's most prominent actors beginning in the late 1940s. His son Michael Douglas built a career as both a producer and actor, winning the Academy Award for Best Actor for Wall Street (1987). Michael's son Cameron Douglas also pursued acting. All three appeared together in It Runs in the Family (2003).

Robert Downey Sr. was an American actor and filmmaker known for low-budget countercultural films beginning in the late 1950s. His son Robert Downey Jr. made his acting debut as a child in his father's film Pound (1970) and went on to become one of the highest-grossing actors of his generation.

Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter and Nobel Prize laureate widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. His son Jakob Dylan is a musician known as the frontman of The Wallflowers, who achieved commercial success with the album Bringing Down the Horse (1996).

Clint Eastwood is an American actor and director who has won four Academy Awards. Several of his children have pursued entertainment careers. Kyle Eastwood is a jazz musician who appeared in his father's film Honkytonk Man (1982). Alison Eastwood is an actress who appeared in Tightrope (1984) directed by her father. Scott Eastwood has appeared in numerous film productions. Francesca Eastwood, with actress Frances Fisher, has also pursued acting.

Philip Edgar-Jones is a British television producer known for his work at Sky Atlantic, where he commissioned and executive produced numerous critically acclaimed productions. His daughter Daisy Edgar-Jones is an actress known for Normal People (2020) and Where the Crawdads Sing (2022).
Laraine Newman is an American comedian and actress who was an original cast member of Saturday Night Live (1975). Her daughter Mika Einbinder is an actress known for Hacks (2021) on HBO Max.

Danny Elfman is an American composer and musician known as the frontman of Oingo Boingo and for his prolific film scoring career in collaboration with Tim Burton, including Batman (1989), Edward Scissorhands (1990), and the theme to The Simpsons. His son Bodhi Elfman is an actor known for his television and film work.

Maureen O'Sullivan was an Irish actress known for playing Jane in the Tarzan film series of the 1930s and 1940s. Her daughter Mia Farrow is one of the most acclaimed actresses of her generation, known for Rosemary's Baby (1968) and thirteen films directed by Woody Allen. Mia's sister Tisa Farrow is also an actress. Ronan Farrow, son of Mia Farrow and Woody Allen, is a journalist and television personality known for his MSNBC show, NBC Today segment, and Pulitzer Prize-winning reporting. He was named after his grandmother Maureen O'Sullivan, whose middle name was 'Rona.' The Farrows represent one of Hollywood's most storied entertainment families.

Sally Field is an American actress who has won two Academy Awards for Best Actress for Norma Rae (1979) and Places in the Heart (1984). Her son Peter Craig became an Academy Award-nominated screenwriter, known for The Town, The Hunger Games series, and Top Gun: Maverick (2022).

Ralph Fiennes is a British actor known for The English Patient (1996), Schindler's List (1993), and the Harry Potter series. His brother Joseph Fiennes is an actor known for Shakespeare in Love (1998). Their brother Magnus Fiennes is a musician and director. Magnus's son Hero Fiennes Tiffin is an actor known for the After film series (2019).

Laurence Fishburne is an American actor known for The Matrix trilogy (1999–2003), Boyz n the Hood (1991), and Apocalypse Now (1979). His wife Gina Torres is an actress known for Suits (2011). Their daughter Montana Fishburne has pursued an entertainment career.

Debbie Reynolds was an American actress and entertainer known for Singin' in the Rain (1952). Her daughter Carrie Fisher, with singer Eddie Fisher, became known for Star Wars (1977) and as a writer and mental health advocate. Carrie Fisher's daughter Billie Lourd is an actress known for Scream Queens (2015) and American Horror Story. Three consecutive generations of women in entertainment.

The Fonda family has been active in Hollywood across four generations. Henry Fonda established the family's presence in film beginning in the 1930s. His children Jane and Peter both pursued acting careers. Peter's daughter Bridget Fonda continued into a third generation of film acting.

Edward Fox is a British actor known for The Day of the Jackal (1973) and numerous other film and stage productions. His brother James Fox is also a prominent British actor. Edward's daughter Emilia Fox is an actress known for Silent Witness (1997) and numerous other British productions.

Michael J. Fox is an American actor known for the Back to the Future trilogy and Family Ties (1982–1989). Tracy Pollan is an American actress who also appeared in Family Ties, where the couple met. Both are established actors in film and television.

Liam Gallagher is a British musician and co-founder of Oasis, one of the most commercially successful British rock bands of the 1990s. His son Lennon Gallagher, with actress Patsy Kensit, has pursued a modeling career with Burberry. Noel Gallagher's daughter Anais Gallagher has also modeled. The Oasis reunion in 2024 brought renewed attention to the next generation.

Cindy Crawford is an American model and one of the most successful supermodels of the 1990s. Her daughter Kaia Gerber has pursued both modeling and acting careers. Her son Presley Gerber has also modeled. Both parents — Cindy Crawford and Rande Gerber — are prominent figures in the entertainment and hospitality industries.

Hugh Gibb was a British musician and bandleader. Three of his sons — Barry, Robin, and Maurice Gibb — formed the Bee Gees, one of the best-selling musical groups of all time, known for their contributions to the Saturday Night Fever soundtrack (1977).
Barry Gibb of the Bee Gees has a son, Steve Gibb, who pursued a music career. Steve Gibb performed with the band Brother and released music as a solo artist.
Brendan Gleeson is an Irish actor known for his roles in Braveheart (1995), In Bruges (2008), and the Harry Potter series. Two of his sons, Domhnall and Brian Gleeson, both pursued acting careers.

Whoopi Goldberg is an American actress and comedian who has won the Academy Award, Emmy, Grammy, and Tony Awards (EGOT). Her daughter Alex Martin is an actress who has appeared in several of her mother's film and television productions.

Samuel Goldwyn was an American film producer and co-founder of several major Hollywood studios including Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer (MGM). His son Samuel Goldwyn Jr. was also a prominent film producer. His grandson Tony Goldwyn is an actor known for Scandal (2012) and Ghost (1990). Tony Goldwyn has publicly described himself as a third-generation nepo baby.

Cary Grant was a British-American actor considered one of classic Hollywood's definitive leading men, known for North by Northwest (1959), To Catch a Thief (1955), and Bringing Up Baby (1938). He received an honorary Academy Award in 1970. His daughter Jennifer Grant, with actress Dyan Cannon, pursued an acting career in television.

Marlène Jobert is a French actress known for numerous French film productions. Her twin daughters Eva and Joséphine Green both pursued acting careers. Eva Green is known for Casino Royale (2006) and Peaky Blinders (2019). Joséphine Jobert is known for Death in Paradise (2015).

Tippi Hedren is an American actress known for Alfred Hitchcock's The Birds (1963) and Marnie (1964). Her daughter Melanie Griffith became an actress known for Working Girl (1988), for which she received an Academy Award nomination. Melanie Griffith's daughter Dakota Johnson, with actor Don Johnson, became known for Fifty Shades of Grey (2015) and The Lost Daughter (2021). Three generations, all in film.

Woody Guthrie was an American singer-songwriter considered one of the most significant figures in American folk music, known for This Land Is Your Land. His son Arlo Guthrie is a folk musician known for Alice's Restaurant (1967) and appeared in the film adaptation Alice's Restaurant (1969). Arlo's daughter Cathy Guthrie is also a musician.
Stephen Gyllenhaal is an American film and television director. His daughter Maggie Gyllenhaal and son Jake Gyllenhaal both became film actors. Their mother Naomi Foner is a screenwriter.

Yolanda Hadid is a Dutch-American former model who appeared on The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills (2012) and actively managed the modeling careers of her daughters. Gigi Hadid is one of the highest-paid models in the world. Bella Hadid has had a major modeling career. Anwar Hadid has also modeled. All three children credit their mother's industry connections as central to their careers.

Tom Hanks is an American actor who has won two consecutive Academy Awards for Best Actor for Philadelphia (1993) and Forrest Gump (1994). His wife Rita Wilson is an actress and singer. His son Colin Hanks, from his first marriage, and his son Chet Hanks, with Rita Wilson, both pursued entertainment careers.

Ed Harris is an American actor with four Academy Award nominations. Amy Madigan is an American actress known for Field of Dreams (1989). They have been married since 1983. Their daughter Lily Harris has pursued an acting career.

George Harrison was a British musician and co-founder of the Beatles. His wife Olivia Arias Harrison has been involved in film production. Their son Dhani Harrison is a musician who has released multiple albums and collaborated with numerous artists.

Ethan Hawke is an American actor, director, and writer who began his film career in the mid-1980s. Uma Thurman is an American actress known for Pulp Fiction (1994) and Kill Bill (2003). Their daughter Maya Hawke pursued careers in both acting and music.

Goldie Hawn is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Cactus Flower (1969). Her children Kate and Oliver Hudson, with musician Bill Hudson, both pursued acting careers. Her son Wyatt Russell, with actor Kurt Russell, also became an actor.

Tim Healy is a British actor known for Auf Wiedersehen, Pet (1983). Denise Welch is a British actress and television personality known for Coronation Street (1990) and Hollyoaks. Their son Matty Healy is the frontman of the rock band The 1975, one of the most successful British acts of the 2010s.

Craig Hemsworth is an Australian actor and social worker who appeared in several Australian television productions. His wife Leonie Hemsworth is also an actress. Three of their sons pursued acting careers: Luke Hemsworth, who is known for Westworld (2016); Chris Hemsworth, known for Thor (2011) and the Marvel Cinematic Universe; and Liam Hemsworth, known for The Hunger Games franchise (2012).

Bono (born Paul David Hewson) is an Irish musician and co-founder of U2, one of the best-selling music acts in history. His daughter Eve Hewson is an Irish actress known for The Knick (2014) and Behind Her Eyes (2021).

Kathy Hilton is an American actress and television personality who appeared in several productions before becoming a socialite and talent manager. Her daughter Paris Hilton became one of the most prominent reality television personalities of the early 2000s through The Simple Life (2003), which she co-starred with Nicole Richie. Paris Hilton is widely credited with pioneering the celebrity-for-being-famous model. Her sister Nicky Hilton has pursued modeling and fashion design.

Dustin Hoffman is an American actor who has won two Academy Awards for Best Actor for Kramer vs. Kramer (1979) and Rain Man (1988). His son Jake Hoffman is an actor who has appeared in numerous film and television productions.

Dominic Holland is an English comedian, author, and broadcaster who won the Perrier Best Newcomer Award at the Edinburgh Festival in 1993. His son Tom Holland is one of the most successful actors of his generation, known for his role as Spider-Man in the Marvel Cinematic Universe beginning with Captain America: Civil War (2016). Tom is a covert nepo case — his father is well known in the UK but not Hollywood, making his industry connection less obvious to American audiences. His brother Sam Holland is also an actor.

Dennis Hopper was an American actor and filmmaker known for Easy Rider (1969), which he also directed, and Blue Velvet (1986). His son Henry Hopper made his film debut in Gus Van Sant's Restless (2011).

Cissy Houston is an American gospel and R&B singer who performed as a session vocalist and with her group the Sweet Inspirations. Her daughter Whitney Houston became one of the best-selling music artists of all time, also pursuing a film career.

Rance Howard was an American character actor with a career spanning five decades. His wife Jean Speegle Howard was also an actress. Their son Ron Howard became one of Hollywood's most prominent directors, winning the Academy Award for Best Director for A Beautiful Mind (2001). Their son Clint Howard is also an actor. Ron Howard's daughters Bryce Dallas and Paige Howard have both pursued acting careers, extending the family to a fourth generation of entertainers.

Olivia Hussey is a British-Argentine actress known for her starring role as Juliet in Franco Zeffirelli's Romeo and Juliet (1968). Her daughter India Eisley is an actress known for The Secret Life of the American Teenager (2008).

Three generations of the Huston family worked in Hollywood film. Walter Huston was a stage and screen actor. His son John Huston became one of Hollywood's most prominent directors. John directed his father Walter in The Treasure of the Sierra Madre (1948), and later directed his daughter Anjelica in Prizzi's Honor (1985).

Jeremy Irons is a British actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for Reversal of Fortune (1990). His wife Sinead Cusack is an Irish actress. Their son Max Irons has pursued an acting career in film and television.

Joe Jackson managed the musical careers of his children beginning in the mid-1960s. The Jackson 5 — Jackie, Tito, Jermaine, Marlon, and Michael — signed with Motown Records in 1969. Michael Jackson went on to become one of the most commercially successful entertainers of the 20th century. Janet Jackson built a separate career as a musician and actress beginning in the 1980s. La Toya Jackson also pursued a music career.

Mick Jagger is the lead vocalist of the Rolling Stones, one of the most commercially successful bands in rock history. His son James Jagger pursued an acting career. His daughter Georgia May Jagger became a model.

Angelina Jolie is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Girl, Interrupted (1999). Brad Pitt is an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Picture for 12 Years a Slave (2013). Their daughter Zahara Jolie-Pitt appeared on the red carpet at the Eternals premiere (2021); their daughter Shiloh Jolie-Pitt has attracted public attention for her dancing.

Quincy Jones is an American record producer, composer, and musician who has won 28 Grammy Awards. He is one of the most successful music executives in history. His daughter Rashida Jones, with actress Peggy Lipton, is an actress and writer known for The Office (2005) and Parks and Recreation (2009). His daughter Kidada Jones is a fashion designer and actress.

Kris Jenner is an American television personality and talent manager who serves as the executive producer and manager for her family's entertainment ventures. Robert Kardashian Sr. was an attorney who gained television prominence during the O.J. Simpson trial. Caitlyn Jenner is a former Olympic decathlete and television personality. Their children Kim, Kourtney, Khloé, Rob, Kendall, and Kylie Kardashian-Jenner all became prominent television personalities and entrepreneurs through Keeping Up With the Kardashians (2007).

Lawrence Kasdan is an American filmmaker and screenwriter known for co-writing The Empire Strikes Back (1980), Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981), and Return of the Jedi (1983). His son Jake Kasdan is a film and television director known for the Jumanji franchise reboot (2017) and Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story (2007).

Nicole Kidman is an Australian actress who won the Academy Award for Best Actress for The Hours (2002). Tom Cruise is an American actor known for Top Gun (1986) and the Mission: Impossible franchise. Together they adopted two children, Isabella and Connor Cruise, both of whom have pursued entertainment interests.

Ben Kingsley is a British actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for Gandhi (1982), one of the most celebrated performances in film history. He is known for Schindler's List (1993), Sexy Beast (2000), and numerous other acclaimed roles. His son Edmund Kingsley is a British actor known for television and film roles including Jupiter Ascending (2015).

Kevin Kline is an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for A Fish Called Wanda (1988). Phoebe Cates is an American actress known for Fast Times at Ridgemont High (1982). Their son Owen Kline appeared in The Squid and the Whale (2005).

Mathew Knowles is an American music executive who managed Destiny's Child and the early career of his daughter Beyoncé Knowles. Beyoncé became one of the most commercially successful musicians of the early 21st century. His daughter Solange Knowles also pursued a music career, releasing her debut album in 2003.

Lenny Kravitz is an American musician who began his recording career in 1989. Lisa Bonet is an American actress known for her role in The Cosby Show (1984) and A Different World (1987). Their daughter Zoë Kravitz pursued an acting career beginning in the early 2010s.

Jude Law is a British actor who has received two Academy Award nominations. His son Rafferty Law has pursued acting and modeling careers. His daughter Iris Law has pursued modeling and television work.

Bruce Lee was a Hong Kong-American martial artist and actor who became one of the most influential figures in martial arts cinema. His wife Linda Lee Cadwell appeared in documentary productions about her husband. Their son Brandon Lee pursued an acting career and died during production of The Crow (1994) in a firearms accident on set.

John Lennon was a British musician and co-founder of the Beatles, one of the most commercially successful musical acts in history. His son Julian Lennon, with Cynthia Powell, is a musician. His son Sean Lennon, with artist and musician Yoko Ono, is also a musician and actor.

Eugene Levy is a Canadian actor and comedian known for the American Pie franchise and as a founding member of SCTV. His son Dan Levy co-created and co-starred with his father in Schitt's Creek (2015-2020), winning four Emmy Awards in one year — for acting, writing, directing, and producing — becoming the first person to achieve this in a single season. His daughter Sarah Levy also appeared in Schitt's Creek as Twyla Sands. The Levys are one of the most celebrated father-son creative partnerships in recent television history.

Barbara Alyn Woods is an American actress known for One Tree Hill (2003) and numerous television productions. Three of her daughters — Natalie, Emily, and Alyvia Alyn Lind — have all pursued acting careers. Emily Alyn Lind is known for Gossip Girl (2021). This is one of the densest mother-to-daughters acting clusters in contemporary television.

John Lithgow is an American actor who has won two Emmy Awards and two Tony Awards. He is known for 3rd Rock from the Sun (1996-2001), The Crown (2016-2017), and numerous film and stage roles. His son Ian Lithgow is an actor known for his television and film appearances.

Ernie Lively is an American actor known for The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants (2005), in which he appeared alongside his daughter Blake Lively in her film debut. Blake Lively is an actress known for Gossip Girl (2007) and numerous film roles.

Lori Loughlin is an American actress known for Full House (1988). Her daughters Olivia Jade and Isabella Giannulli became social media personalities and content creators. The family became the subject of significant public attention following the 2019 college admissions scandal.
Rob Lowe is an American actor known for The West Wing (2000) and Parks and Recreation. His sons Matthew and John Owen Lowe have both pursued careers in acting and writing.

Sid Luft was an American film producer and talent manager. His children with Judy Garland — Lorna and Joey Luft — both pursued entertainment careers. Lorna Luft is a singer and actress; Joey Luft appeared in several productions. They are half-siblings of Liza Minnelli.

Jayne Mansfield was an American actress and one of the defining sex symbols of the 1950s, known for her work in Hollywood films and as a Playboy centerfold. Mickey Hargitay was a Hungarian-American bodybuilder and actor who won the Mr. Universe title. Their daughter Mariska Hargitay is an actress known for Law & Order: SVU (1999), for which she won an Emmy Award and a Golden Globe.

Joe Mantegna is an American actor known for The Godfather Part III (1990), Bugsy (1991), and his long-running role as David Rossi in Criminal Minds (2007-2020). His daughter Gia Mantegna is an actress known for Pretty Little Liars and other television productions.

Bob Marley was a Jamaican singer and musician who became one of the most influential music figures of the 20th century and the most widely known reggae performer. Five of his sons — Ziggy, Damian, Stephen, Julian, and Ky-Mani Marley — have all pursued music careers, making the Marleys one of the most prominent multi-generational music dynasties in history.

Garry Marshall was an American filmmaker and television producer known for Happy Days (1974) and Pretty Woman (1990). His sister Penny Marshall was an actress and director known for Laverne and Shirley (1976) and Big (1988). Garry Marshall's daughter Kathleen Marshall is a Tony Award-winning theater director and choreographer.

Paul McCartney is a British musician and co-founder of the Beatles, one of the best-selling musical acts of all time. His wife Linda McCartney was a photographer and musician who performed with Wings. Their son James McCartney is a musician and singer-songwriter.

Malcolm McDowell is a British actor known for A Clockwork Orange (1971) and numerous other film and television roles. Mary Steenburgen is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Melvin and Howard (1980). Their son Charlie McDowell is an American film director.

Judy Garland was an American actress and singer, known for The Wizard of Oz (1939) and A Star Is Born (1954). Vincente Minnelli was an American film director known for An American in Paris (1951) and Gigi (1958). Their daughter Liza Minnelli became an actress and singer, winning the Academy Award for Best Actress for Cabaret (1972).

Jason Momoa is an American actor known for Aquaman (2018), Game of Thrones (2011-2016), and the Dune franchise. He was married to actress Lisa Bonet, the daughter of Lenny Kravitz's former partner. Their son Nakoa-Wolf Momoa was cast in Dune 3 alongside his father in June 2025, making his feature film debut at age 16. Their daughter Lola Iolani Momoa is a singer who has performed publicly with her father. Nakoa-Wolf and Lola are half-siblings of actress Zoë Kravitz through their mother Lisa Bonet.
Eddie Murphy is an American actor, comedian, and filmmaker who became one of the highest-grossing actors of the 1980s and 1990s. His daughter Bria Murphy has pursued an acting and modeling career.

Willie Nelson is an American country singer-songwriter and one of the most prominent figures in country music history. His sons Lukas Nelson and Micah Nelson are both musicians. Lukas Nelson fronts Promise of the Real and contributed to the soundtrack of A Star Is Born (2018).

Timothy Dalton is a British actor known for playing James Bond in The Living Daylights (1987) and Licence to Kill (1989). Vanessa Redgrave is a British actress who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Julia (1977). Their son Carlo Gabriel Nero is a British film director.

Paul Newman was an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for The Color of Money (1986). Joanne Woodward is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Actress for The Three Faces of Eve (1957). Two of their daughters, Melissa and Clea Newman, pursued acting careers.

Jack Nicholson is an American actor who has won three Academy Awards — more than any other male actor — for One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest (1975), Terms of Endearment (1983), and As Good as It Gets (1997). His daughter Jennifer Nicholson, with his first wife actress Sandra Knight, is an actress and fashion designer.

Alessandro Nivola is an American actor known for The Brutalist (2024), American Hustle (2013), and The Many Saints of Newark (2021). Emily Mortimer is a British actress and the daughter of Sir John Mortimer, creator of Rumpole of the Bailey. Their son Sam Nivola starred in White Noise (2022), Maestro (2023), and The White Lotus Season 3 (2025), making him one of the most prominent nepo babies of 2025. Their daughter May Nivola also acts. Sam is a third-generation entertainer through his maternal grandfather.

members.role: Third generation root — dramatist/creator of Rumpole

summary: Nick Nolte is an American actor known for 48 Hrs (1982), Cape Fear (1991), and Affliction (1997), for which he received his third Academy Award nomination. His son Brawley Nolte is an actor who has appeared in film and television productions.

Ryan O'Neal was an American actor known for Love Story (1970). His daughter Tatum O'Neal, with actress Joanna Moore, appeared with him in Paper Moon (1973) and became the youngest competitive Oscar winner in history at age ten. His son Griffin O'Neal also pursued acting. His son Redmond O'Neal, with actress Farrah Fawcett, also appeared in film productions.

Ozzy Osbourne is a British musician, co-founder of Black Sabbath, and solo artist. His wife Sharon Osbourne managed his career and became a television personality. Their children Kelly and Jack Osbourne first gained wide public attention through the MTV reality series The Osbournes (2002–2005).

George Osmond and Olive Osmond were the parents and managers of The Osmonds, one of the most commercially successful family music acts in American history. The family launched their entertainment careers in the late 1950s and became prominent in the 1970s. Donny Osmond is known for numerous hit recordings. Marie Osmond is a singer and television personality who co-hosted Donny and Marie (1976). Alan, Wayne, Merrill, Jay, and Jimmy Osmond all performed as members of The Osmonds.

Al Pacino is an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for Scent of a Woman (1992). He is one of the most acclaimed actors of his generation. His daughter Olivia Pacino and twin children Anton and Everly Pacino have been raised in the entertainment world.

Blythe Danner is an American actress with a career in film and theater beginning in the early 1970s. Her daughter Gwyneth Paltrow pursued an acting career, winning the Academy Award for Best Actress for Shakespeare in Love (1998). Gwyneth's father Bruce Paltrow was a film and television director.

Gregory Peck was an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for To Kill a Mockingbird (1962), one of the most celebrated performances in film history. His daughter Cecilia Peck is an actress and documentary filmmaker; his son Carey Peck has also worked as an actor.

Leo Penn was an American actor and television director. Eileen Ryan is an American actress. Three of their sons pursued entertainment careers: Michael Penn as a musician, Sean Penn as an actor who won two Academy Awards, and Chris Penn as an actor.

John Phillips was an American musician and songwriter, co-founder of The Mamas & the Papas. Michelle Phillips was also a member of the group and subsequently pursued an acting career. Their daughter Chynna Phillips became a musician as part of Wilson Phillips. Their daughter Mackenzie Phillips pursued an acting career.

Marc Platt is an American film and Broadway producer whose credits include Wicked (2003), La La Land (2016), and Legally Blonde (2001). His son Ben Platt is an actor and singer who won the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Musical for Dear Evan Hansen (2017). Ben Platt is cited in the New York magazine nepo baby issue as a prime example of the industry-baby archetype.

Christopher Plummer was a Canadian actor who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for Beginners (2011), becoming the oldest Oscar winner in history at age 82. Tammy Grimes was an American actress who won two Tony Awards. Their daughter Amanda Plummer is known for Pulp Fiction (1994) and Twelve Monkeys (1995). Both parents were celebrated stage legends.

Elvis Presley was one of the most commercially successful musicians in American history. His daughter Lisa Marie Presley released a debut album in 2003. Lisa Marie's daughter Riley Keough pursued an acting career beginning in the 2010s.

Richard Pryor was an American stand-up comedian and actor widely regarded as one of the most influential comedians of the 20th century. His daughter Rain Pryor is an actress and comedian who has appeared in numerous film and television productions.

Bill Pullman is an American actor known for Independence Day (1996), While You Were Sleeping (1995), and Spaceballs (1987). His son Lewis Pullman is an actor known for Top Gun: Maverick (2022) and Thunderbolts (2025). Lewis publicly acknowledged his nepo advantage, saying he was 'undeniably fortunate' to have grown up around the industry.

Randy and Dennis Quaid are brothers who both pursued acting careers. Randy Quaid received an Academy Award nomination for Best Supporting Actor for The Last Detail (1973). Dennis Quaid became known for film roles throughout the 1980s and 1990s. Their parents were not in the entertainment industry.

Andie MacDowell is an American actress and model known for Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994) and Groundhog Day (1993). Her daughter Margaret Qualley is an actress known for Once Upon a Time in Hollywood (2019) and Maid (2021). Her daughter Rainey Qualley is also a singer and actress.

Jill Clayburgh was an American actress who received two Academy Award nominations for An Unmarried Woman (1978) and Starting Over (1979). Her daughter Lily Rabe is an actress known for American Horror Story (2011) and Succession.

Ronald Reagan was an American film and television actor with a career spanning 1937 to 1964 before entering politics. His first wife Jane Wyman won the Academy Award for Best Actress for Johnny Belinda (1948). His second wife Nancy Davis was also a film actress. Several of their children pursued entertainment careers.

Robert Redford is an American actor, director, and producer known for Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid (1969), All the President's Men (1976), and Ordinary People (1980), for which he won the Academy Award for Best Director. He is the founder of the Sundance Institute and Film Festival. His daughter Amy Redford is an actress and director who has appeared in numerous independent films.

The Redgrave family is a British acting dynasty spanning three generations. Michael Redgrave was a prominent stage and screen actor. His daughters Vanessa and Lynn Redgrave both had significant acting careers. Vanessa's daughters Natasha and Joely Richardson continued into a third generation of film and television acting.

Ivan Reitman was a Canadian filmmaker known for Ghostbusters (1984), Stripes (1981), and producing National Lampoon's Animal House (1978). His son Jason Reitman is an acclaimed filmmaker known for Juno (2007), Up in the Air (2009), and Ghostbusters: Afterlife (2021) — which he directed as a tribute to his father. Jason grew up on his father's film sets and appears in baby photos from Animal House. Ivan's daughter Catherine Reitman is the creator, executive producer, writer, and star of the CBC comedy series Workin' Moms. The Reitmans are one of the most documented filmmaker dynasties in North American cinema.

Lionel Richie is an American singer-songwriter known for Hello (1984) and We Are the World (1985). His adopted daughter Nicole Richie became a television personality known for The Simple Life (2003). His biological daughter Sofia Richie has pursued a modeling career.

Robert Scott Ringwald is an American jazz musician. His daughter Molly Ringwald became one of the most prominent actresses of the 1980s, known for Sixteen Candles (1984), The Breakfast Club (1985), and Pretty in Pink (1986).

Walter Roberts was an American actor and playwright. Three of his children — Eric, Julia, and Lisa Roberts — all pursued acting careers. Julia Roberts won the Academy Award for Best Actress for Erin Brockovich (2000). Eric Roberts's daughter Emma Roberts also became an actress, extending the family to a third generation.

Roberto Rossellini was an Italian film director regarded as one of the founders of the Italian neorealist movement. Ingrid Bergman was a Swedish actress who won three Academy Awards and is considered one of the greatest actresses of the 20th century. Their daughter Isabella Rossellini is an actress and model known for Blue Velvet (1986) and numerous other film and television productions.

Diana Ross is an American singer and actress, a founding member of The Supremes and one of the best-selling music artists of all time. Her daughter Tracee Ellis Ross, with music executive Berry Gordy, is an actress known for Black-ish (2014). Her daughter Rhonda Ross Kendrick, also with Berry Gordy, is a singer and actress.

Minnie Riperton was an American singer known for Lovin' You (1974), one of the most distinctive vocal performances in pop music history. Richard Rudolph is an American songwriter and record producer who wrote and produced much of Riperton's work. Their daughter Maya Rudolph is an actress and comedian known for Saturday Night Live (2000–2007).

Adam Sandler is an American actor, comedian, and filmmaker known for his prolific comedy career including Happy Gilmore (1996), Billy Madison (1995), and Uncut Gems (2019). His wife Jackie Sandler is an actress who frequently appears in his films. Their daughters Sadie and Sunny Sandler have appeared in numerous Adam Sandler productions including Grown Ups (2010) and Hotel Transylvania (2012).

Susan Sarandon is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Actress for Dead Man Walking (1995). Tim Robbins is an American actor and director. Three of Susan Sarandon's children have pursued entertainment careers: Eva Amurri with director Franco Amurri, and Jack Henry Robbins and Miles Robbins with Tim Robbins.

Rob Schneider is an American comedian, actor, and writer known for his work on Saturday Night Live (1990-1994) and numerous comedy films including Deuce Bigalow: Male Gigolo (1999). His daughter Elle King, born Tanner Elle Schneider, changed her name at 18 to establish an independent identity. She is known for Ex's & Oh's (2015) and has appeared as a judge on The Voice.

members.role: Second generation — singer (stage name Elle King)

summary: Arnold Schwarzenegger is an Austrian-American actor, bodybuilder, and politician known for The Terminator (1984) and Predator (1987). Maria Shriver is an American journalist and television personality. Three of their children have pursued entertainment and modeling careers: Patrick, Christopher, and Katherine Schwarzenegger.

Martin Scorsese is an American film director who won the Academy Award for Best Director for The Departed (2006). His daughter Cathy Scorsese appeared in several of his early films. His daughter Francesca Scorsese has pursued an acting career.

Martin Sheen (born Ramon Estevez) established himself as an actor beginning in the 1960s. His sons Emilio Estevez and Charlie Sheen both pursued acting careers. Emilio retained the family surname while Charlie adopted the stage name Sheen.

Brooke Shields is an American actress and model who became one of the most famous faces of the late 1970s and 1980s, known for Pretty Baby (1978), The Blue Lagoon (1980), and Endless Love (1981). Her daughter Rowan Henchy, with TV writer and producer Chris Henchy, was reported to be filming Bravo's Next Gen NYC in 2025.

M. Night Shyamalan is an American filmmaker known for The Sixth Sense (1999), Unbreakable (2000), and Split (2016). In 2024, both of his daughters launched entertainment projects in the same summer — dubbed the 'Summer of Shyamalan.' Ishana Night Shyamalan directed The Watchers (2024), a Warner Bros. horror film produced by her father, becoming one of the youngest directors to helm a major studio release. Saleka Shyamalan is a singer-songwriter who starred as pop star Lady Raven in her father's film Trap (2024) and has released music with Columbia Records.

Frank Sinatra was one of the most celebrated entertainers of the 20th century, known for his music career spanning six decades and his film roles including From Here to Eternity (1953), for which he won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor. His daughter Nancy Sinatra achieved her own stardom with the number one hit These Boots Are Made for Walkin' (1966) and appeared in several films. His son Frank Sinatra Jr. pursued a career as a singer and conductor. His daughter Tina Sinatra worked as a television and film producer.

Stellan Skarsgård is a Swedish actor known for Good Will Hunting (1997), the Pirates of the Caribbean franchise, and numerous other productions. At least four of his sons have become prominent actors: Alexander Skarsgård, known for True Blood (2008) and Big Little Lies (2017); Bill Skarsgård, known for It (2017) as Pennywise the clown; Gustaf Skarsgård, known for Vikings (2013); and Valter Skarsgård, known for The Northman (2022). The Skarsgårds are one of the most prominent acting dynasties in contemporary Hollywood.

Will Smith is an American actor and rapper who has been one of the most commercially successful actors in Hollywood for three decades. Jada Pinkett Smith is an American actress known for numerous film and television roles. Their son Jaden Smith made his film debut alongside his father in The Pursuit of Happyness (2006) and has pursued acting and music. Their daughter Willow Smith is a singer known for Whip My Hair (2010).

members.role: Second generation — musician (Will's son from first marriage)

summary: Janet Harris is an American actress who has appeared in film and television productions. Several of her children have pursued entertainment careers. Jurnee Smollett is known for Bird Box (2018) and Lovecraft Country (2020). Jussie Smollett is known for Empire (2015).

Paul Sorvino was an American actor known for Goodfellas (1990) and numerous other film and television productions. His daughter Mira Sorvino won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Mighty Aphrodite (1995). Paul Sorvino actively supported his daughter's acting career during its early stages.

Aaron Spelling was one of the most prolific television producers in American history, responsible for Dynasty, Beverly Hills 90210, Melrose Place, and Charmed. His daughter Tori Spelling was cast in Beverly Hills 90210, which her father produced. His son Randy Spelling also pursued an acting career.

Steven Spielberg is an American film director, producer, and screenwriter, widely regarded as one of the most influential filmmakers in cinema history. His wife Kate Capshaw is an actress known for Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984). Two of their children, Sasha and Sawyer Spielberg, have pursued acting careers.

Sylvester Stallone is an American actor, director, and screenwriter known for Rocky (1976) and the Rambo franchise. Jennifer Flavin is an American model and entrepreneur. Their three daughters — Sophia, Sistine, and Scarlet Stallone — have pursued modeling and acting careers.
Ringo Starr is a British musician and co-founder of the Beatles. His son Zak Starkey is a drummer who became the touring and recording drummer for The Who, one of rock's most prominent bands.

Jerry Stiller and Anne Meara were an American comedy duo and acting pair. Jerry Stiller is known for Seinfeld (1993) and The King of Queens (1998). Their son Ben Stiller became an actor, director, and producer. Their daughter Amy Stiller also pursued an acting career.

Meryl Streep is an American actress who has won three Academy Awards, more than any other actor. Three of her children with sculptor Don Gummer have pursued entertainment careers: Henry Gummer as a musician, and Mamie and Grace Gummer as actresses.

Barbra Streisand is an American singer, actress, and filmmaker who has won two Academy Awards, multiple Grammy Awards, and an Emmy Award. Elliott Gould is an American actor. Their son Jason Gould is an actor and musician who appeared in The Prince of Tides (1991), directed by his mother Streisand.

Sting (Gordon Sumner) is a British musician and co-founder of The Police, one of the best-selling music acts of all time. His wife Trudie Styler is a British actress, director, and film producer. Their son Joe Sumner is a musician who performs with Fiction Plane. Their daughter Coco Sumner is a musician who performs as I Blame Coco.

Donald Sutherland established himself as one of Canada's most prominent film actors beginning in the mid-1960s. His son Kiefer Sutherland also pursued an acting career, becoming best known for the television series 24 (2001–2010).

Patsy Swayze was an American choreographer, dance teacher, and actress who taught and choreographed extensively in Houston, Texas. Both of her sons, Patrick and Don Swayze, pursued acting careers. Patrick Swayze became known for Dirty Dancing (1987) and Ghost (1990).

Alan Thicke was a Canadian actor, songwriter, and television host, known for Growing Pains (1985–1992). His son Robin Thicke pursued a career as a musician and has released multiple albums since the early 2000s.

John Travolta is an American actor known for Saturday Night Fever (1977), Grease (1978), and Pulp Fiction (1994). His wife Kelly Preston was an actress known for Jerry Maguire (1996). Their daughter Ella Bleu Travolta appeared alongside her father in Old Dogs (2009).

Tina Turner was an American singer and actress widely regarded as the Queen of Rock n Roll. Ike Turner was an American musician and bandleader. Their son Ronnie Turner was a musician who played bass for his parents' band and later performed with Tina Turner's touring group.

Steven Tyler is an American musician and co-founder of Aerosmith. His daughter Liv Tyler pursued an acting career beginning in the mid-1990s, becoming known for the Lord of the Rings film trilogy (2001–2003). Liv Tyler was unaware that Steven Tyler was her biological father until age nine.
Casper Van Dien is an American actor known for Starship Troopers (1997). His daughter Grace Van Dien is an actress known for Stranger Things (2022) and other film and television productions.

Eddie Van Halen was an American musician and co-founder of Van Halen, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time. Valerie Bertinelli is an American actress known for One Day at a Time (1975). Their son Wolfgang Van Halen is a musician who played bass for Van Halen and leads his own band Mammoth WVH.

Dick Van Patten was an American actor known for Eight Is Enough (1977). His son Tim Van Patten is a television director and producer known for directing episodes of The Sopranos, The Wire, Boardwalk Empire, and Game of Thrones. Tim's daughter Grace Van Patten is an actress known for Tell Me Lies (2022).

Jon Voight is an American actor who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for Coming Home (1978). His daughter Angelina Jolie pursued an acting career and won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Girl, Interrupted (1999). His son James Haven also works as an actor and producer.

Donnie Wahlberg is an American actor, singer, and co-founder of New Kids on the Block. Mark Wahlberg is an American actor and producer known for Boogie Nights (1997) and The Departed (2006). Paul Wahlberg is a chef and television personality. Robert Wahlberg is an actor. All four are brothers from Dorchester, Massachusetts whose parents were not in the entertainment industry.

Loudon Wainwright III is an American singer-songwriter known for his confessional folk music style. His son Rufus Wainwright is an acclaimed singer-songwriter and opera composer. His daughter Martha Wainwright is a singer-songwriter whose debut album received Grammy consideration. His daughter Lucy Wainwright Roche (with Suzzy Roche of The Roches) is also a folk musician. The Wainwrights are one of the most musically accomplished multi-generational folk families in North America.

Denzel Washington is an American actor who has won two Academy Awards. His wife Pauletta Washington is an actress and pianist. Their son John David Washington pursued an acting career, earning a Golden Globe nomination for BlacKkKlansman (2018).

Keenen Ivory, Damon, Kim, Shawn, and Marlon Wayans are siblings who all pursued careers in film, television, and comedy. Their parents were not in the entertainment industry. Keenen Ivory Wayans created the sketch comedy series In Living Color (1990). Damon Wayans's son Damon Wayans Jr. also became an actor.

John Wayne was an American actor and cultural icon, winner of the Academy Award for Best Actor for True Grit (1969). Two of his sons pursued acting careers: Patrick Wayne appeared in numerous films including several alongside his father, and Ethan Wayne has appeared in film and television.

Andrew Lloyd Webber is a British composer known for Cats (1981), The Phantom of the Opera (1986), and many other musical productions. His daughter Imogen Lloyd Webber is a television presenter and author.

Jack White is an American musician known as the frontman of The White Stripes and for his extensive solo career. Karen Elson is a British model and singer-songwriter. Their daughter Scarlett White made her Paris Fashion Week debut in 2024 and went viral on TikTok when her father — known for his tech-phobic stance — appeared in a post to congratulate her on her catwalk debut.

Robin Williams was an American comedian and actor who won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for Good Will Hunting (1997). His daughter Zelda Williams is an actress and director who has appeared in numerous film and television productions.

Brian Williams is an American journalist and television news anchor who served as anchor of NBC Nightly News. Jane Stoddard Williams is an American television producer. Their daughter Allison Williams is an actress known for Girls (2012) and Get Out (2017).

Bruce Willis is an American actor known for the Die Hard franchise and numerous other film roles. Demi Moore is an American actress known for Ghost (1990) and Indecent Proposal (1993). Their daughters Rumer, Scout, and Tallulah Willis all pursued entertainment careers.

Brian Wilson is an American musician and co-founder of the Beach Boys. His daughters Carnie and Wendy Wilson both pursued music careers. They formed Wilson Phillips in 1989 alongside Chynna Phillips, daughter of John and Michelle Phillips of The Mamas & the Papas.

Reese Witherspoon is an American actress who won the Academy Award for Best Actress for Walk the Line (2005). Ryan Phillippe is an American actor. Their daughter Ava Phillippe has pursued a modeling career and has appeared in productions.

members.role: Second generation — musician (covert: uses Phillippe surname)

summary: Michael Wolff is an American jazz musician and television personality known as the bandleader on The Arsenio Hall Show and The Tonight Show. Polly Draper is an American actress known for thirtysomething (1987). Their sons Alex Wolff and Nat Wolff are both actors, with Alex known for Hereditary (2018) and Nat for The Fault in Our Stars (2014).

Frank Zappa was an American musician, composer, and filmmaker known for his prolific and eclectic output. Three of his four children with Gail Zappa pursued entertainment careers: Moon Unit Zappa as a singer and actress, Dweezil Zappa as a musician, and Ahmet Zappa as a musician and author.
